description: Absolute memory budget ceilings for memcheck regression gating. Single source of truth consumed by cargo xtask memcheck and CI.

idle_warm.description: Pre-work idle ceiling (~459 MiB). After A+: 184320 KiB (180 MiB). After B: 102400 KiB (100 MiB).

index.description: Pre-work peak indexing ceiling (~723 MiB). After A+: 460800 KiB (450 MiB). After B: 307200 KiB (300 MiB).

idle_post.description: Pre-work idle ceiling (~459 MiB). After A+: 184320 KiB (180 MiB). After B: 102400 KiB (100 MiB).

query.description: Pre-work peak query ceiling (~518 MiB). After A+: 256000 KiB (250 MiB). After B: 184320 KiB (180 MiB).

reindex.description: Pre-work peak reindex ceiling (~723 MiB). After A+: 460800 KiB (450 MiB). After B: 307200 KiB (300 MiB).

idle_final.description: Pre-work idle ceiling (~459 MiB). After A+: 184320 KiB (180 MiB). After B: 102400 KiB (100 MiB).
